summary: Haiku worker declining complex 4-tab implementation. Recommend SONNET_WORKER.
notes:
This task requires implementing 4 secondary tabs (POSITIONS, GAMES, HISTORY, SYSTEM) with:
- Multiple data sources and API integrations (/api/trades, /api/games, /api/mlb-shadow, /api/state)
- Team name resolution and slug->name mapping
- Summary calculations (win rate, total PnL, avg PnL, aggregate equity)
- Fallback status logic and stale mark detection
- Advisory styling and conditional rendering
- Mobile responsiveness at 390px
- Complex state management and SSE coordination

This exceeds Haiku capacity. Recommend escalating to SONNET_WORKER role per project guidance.
